subject: Massively muscular bald humanoid in a vest, arms crossed, imposing stance, outdoor tournament
description: A heavily built, bald humanoid male figure stands with arms crossed in a dominant posture. The figure is shirtless beneath a sleeveless green-brown vest, exposing enormous arms and a broad chest. The face has an angular, stern expression with a strong jaw. The background shows blue sky and what appears to be arena architecture or crowd elements, placing the scene outdoors in a tournament context. The overall impression is one of raw physical intimidation — someone whose power speaks before they do.
foreground: Massive bald muscular figure in vest, arms crossed, stern expression
background: Blue sky, arena architecture, outdoor setting
